name: ai-pipeline
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the pipeline plugin — long-chain AI workflow design, execution, and self-improvement for Claude Code.

plugins.name: pipeline
plugins.description: Design, run, and self-improve long-chain AI workflows as ordered, self-contained iteration files under the consumer project's .claude/pipeline/. A deterministic Bun CLI (pipeline next) owns orchestration control flow; a thin pipeline-manager subagent executes each step in a fresh-context step-executor, and a self-improvement loop feeds execution-discovered knowledge back into the pipeline's own docs. Ships the pipeline CLI and a local live dashboard UI.
